name: 💀🩶💛(???) Bulrush! -Mario Wonder.-
description:
I'm unreasonably in love with these big, fluffy guys wearing tracksuits and I have no idea why. They're so well-designed!

Anyways, hope you like this bot. I know it's a bit different than what I make, but there's probably some enjoyment to be had here.

Art by Tugboat on Twitter. (Still not calling it X.)
creator: Helper41111
